productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this nubuck leather pointed toe shoe from red tape. The high ankle style with zippered sides makes this a fabulous addition to your wardrobe.UpperNubuck upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleSynthetic leather overlays in the sides for added shoe structure and stylePointed toe with a slip-in style for ease of useZippers on the side ankles for a customised, snug FitLeather lining on the inner collar and vamp, with a textile lining in the forefoot inner part of the shoeMidsoleCushioned footbed with a leather upper lining and perforations in the forefoot and medial midfoot for enhancedventilation and comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a wood-texture finish, and horizontal grooves on the back heel for ultimate grip and traction even on smooth surfacesRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careUse a nubuck brush to clean the upperDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
